published_note: 9-scene narrated-lesson timeline assembled by Underlord and live/viewable+editable in Descript at project_url. A separate render-to-MP4 share-export (publish --publish job) was NOT requested in this run and was not performed; the deliverable is the assembled Descript composition.
pairing_1to1: ordinal N -> slide-0N.png (full-frame) + narration-0N.mp3 (scene audio), scenes in order 1..9
captions: generated from narration transcripts by Underlord (Classic style), overlaid bottom
slide_fit_or_crop: none — Underlord attestation: each slide fills the 1920x1080 frame with no gaps, no crop/cover/letterbox
underlord_attestation: The composition is assembled and looking great. Each slide fills the frame, different slides show in different scenes, and captions are overlaid at the bottom. 9 scenes, each with its matching slide displayed full-screen over the corresponding narration clip. Total duration ~8 minutes 6 seconds. All slides fill the 1920x1080 frame with no gaps.

jobs.import_job_status: stopped / success (9 slide PNGs + 9 narration MP3s)

build_path: scripts/operator/build_descript_narrated_lesson.py + scripts/api_clients/descript_client.py (proven operator path; direct-upload import + Underlord /jobs/agent assembly). NOTE: descript_client lives under scripts/api_clients/ (not scripts/operator/descript_client.py as the brief stated).
build_exit_code_observation: Part-1 run did NOT reproduce the Part-2 Story C nonzero-despite-success anomaly. The build script (scripts/operator/build_descript_narrated_lesson.py) ran to completion in a backgrounded Bash invocation and exited cleanly: tail of descript-build.log shows 'agent result.status=success', the assembled composition (dur 486.0247s), the project URL, and a final 'EXIT_CODE=0'. The shell reported exit 0 — no spurious nonzero exit from stderr capture was seen here. SECONDARY OBSERVATION (process-detach false alarm): the coordinator briefly believed the build had detached after media import with the composition empty (duration 0); in fact the server-side Underlord agent job was still assembling. A foreground wait_for_job on the EXISTING agent job (project-agent-edit-...-aa1db5e2-...) confirmed it reached stopped/success, and the backgrounded build process itself also completed exit 0. No duplicate agent/import job was dispatched; no re-import occurred.
authoritative_success_signal: Descript get_project: composition e4a0d038 duration 486.024693s (delta -0.009s vs 486.034) + Underlord agent_job result.status=success; treated as authoritative over shell exit code per Part-2 Story C lesson (shell exit code also = 0 here).
